title: Xtra Sour Ethiopian Sausages Stew
description: A sour and gooey Ethiopian stew featuring kabanos sausages, perfect for a weeknight dinner, and pescatarian-friendly by using fish-based broth and skipping traditional meat ingredients.
instructions: Heat the fish broth in a large pot over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Add the sliced kabanos sausages to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix the lemon juice and sodium alginate, then slowly pour the mixture into the pot while stirring constantly.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the berbere spice to the pot and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and let the stew simmer for 10 minutes.
Using a syringe or spoon, drop small amounts of the stew mixture into a bath of cold water to spherify the sauce.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with the spherified sauce.
